summary: Completed comprehensive testing of crypto AI trading bot with focus on NEW FEATURES: LSTM model training/prediction, news sentiment analysis, and combined signal weighting. All 38 backend APIs working (100%), frontend fully functional with real-time WebSocket updates.

minor_issues.issue: Returns empty object when bot is not running - requires bot to be started first
minor_issues.impact: Combined signal data only available when bot loop is active

passed_tests: GET /api/ returns API response
GET /api/pairs returns 8 supported pairs (BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, XRP/USDT, DOGE/USDT, ADA/USDT, AVAX/USDT, DOT/USDT)
GET /api/market/price returns live BTC/USDT price ($66,345.76)
GET /api/market/price?symbol=ETH/USDT returns ETH price ($2,037.50)
GET /api/market/indicators returns RSI, EMA, MACD, Bollinger data with all technical indicators
GET /api/market/orderbook returns bids/asks with signal and volume pressure
GET /api/market/ohlcv returns OHLCV chart data (100 records)
GET /api/market/prices returns multi-pair prices for all 8 supported pairs
POST /api/lstm/train trains the LSTM model successfully (status: trained)
GET /api/lstm/predict returns prediction after training (SELL signal, 4.0% confidence, DOWN direction)
GET /api/lstm/status returns trained status (trained=true)
GET /api/news returns articles from CryptoPanic/CoinDesk/CoinTelegraph (10 articles)
POST /api/news/analyze triggers AI sentiment analysis of news (BEARISH sentiment, score: -72, signal: SELL)
GET /api/news/sentiment returns news sentiment data
GET /api/signal/combined returns weighted combined signal breakdown (TA 25%, OrderBook 15%, LSTM 20%, News 20%, AI 20%)
POST /api/bot/start starts bot loop successfully
GET /api/bot/status shows running=true after start
POST /api/bot/stop stops bot successfully
POST /api/trades/execute executes simulated trade (SIMULATED status)
POST /api/alerts/create creates alert successfully
GET /api/notifications returns notifications list
Frontend loads with Combined Signal panel showing weighted sources (TA, ORDER BOOK, LSTM PREDICTION, NEWS SENTIMENT, GPT-5.2 AI)
Frontend LSTM panel shows model status (MODEL READY) and TRAIN/RETRAIN button working
Frontend News Feed shows articles and ANALYZE SENTIMENT button working
Frontend WebSocket indicator shows WS badge in top bar
LSTM training functionality works (button shows TRAINING... during process)
News sentiment analysis functionality works (button shows ANALYZING... during process)
Real-time WebSocket updates working (signal changed from SELL to WAIT)
Combined signal weighting system working with all 5 components
All 31 previous backend endpoints still working
Live market data integration working for all 8 pairs
AI analysis with GPT-5.2 working
Risk management system functional
Alert system creates and manages alerts
Notification system working
Multi-pair dashboard updates correctly

success_percentage.integration: 100% (all features integrated properly with real-time updates)
